_comment: WO-105 ship spec: BoomClamp realizes geometry (mech drawing + 3D); the remaining airframe parts (spar/skin/fuselage layup + battery pack) have no v1-realizable ops -- identity BOM rows with honestly-empty mass. The avionics board carries no realized outline/netlist inputs in this project, so elec_boards/firmware are named-absent by construction. WO-105 ship fix: rows without realized geometry ride the augment-only bom.lines identity rows -- the mech step-export family requires RealizedGeometry per assembly row.

lines.subject: WingSpar
lines.description: Wing spar, laser-cut AL 7075-T6 (aluminum substitute record, airframe.hema note)

lines.subject: BatteryPack
lines.description: Battery pack case, AL 6061-T6 (cell chemistry out of BOM scope)
